original_text: Shine 125 leke life set ho gayi bhai. Mileage 55+ aa raha hai highway pe. Engine smooth, no vibrations till 80kmph. Best bike in this segment without any doubt. Buy kar lo bina soche. heat bahut aati hai. Hyderabad ke flyovers pe bahut mast feel hota hai.
